checkedConditions: Shared helper chooses Retry-After-derived delays from retryable error messages and caps them to the provider retry cap.
OpenAI, Anthropic, and OpenRouter retry loops compute retry sleep from last retryable error before falling back to jitter.
cargo fmt --check, cargo check -p jcode --lib, and git diff --check passed.
uncheckedConditions: Shared helper chooses Retry-After-derived delay when retryable provider errors include a valid retry-after hint, capped to the provider retry cap.
OpenAI, Anthropic, and OpenRouter retry loops use Retry-After-aware delay with jitter fallback.
Tests cover parsing delay hints from retryable error messages and fallback/cap behavior.
Focused tests, cargo check, selfdev build/reload, governance, commit and push pass.
notes: Retry delay selection now honors Retry-After hints embedded by provider HTTP error formatters, with capped delay and jitter fallback when no hint exists.
